title: Pink Sprinkles By Baked With Love | 90g | Pink & White Sugar Cake Sprinkles, Edible Cake Decorations, Sugar Hearts, Stars, Strands, And Pearls For Cupcakes
features: Party Pink Mix Sprinkles - These pink and white sugar strands, pearls, hearts, and stars are a great edible cake topper for all your celebration cakes including Birthday, Valentines, Weddings, and Baby Showers.

Cake Sprinkles - Sprinkle this incredible mix on cakes, cupcakes, ice cream, pancakes, and cookies for instant colour and wow factor. Easy to use cake decoration for kids and sure to enhance all your baked treats and desserts.

Resealable 90g Bottle - Use a little or a lot, these sprinkles are supplied in an easy to store resealable bottle. Each pack contains enough sprinkles to decorate 2 cakes or 24 cupcakes, or use less for a splash of colour on any other desserts and save the rest for later!
100% Edible Sprinkles - These cake sprinkles are made of sugar so completely edible and with a deliciously sweet subtle flavour. Ideal for all special occasions.

Baked With Love Edible Decorations - These delicious 100's and 1000's are just part of the huge Baked With Love range, put the fun back into baking with Baked with Love cake and cupcake supplies! Range also includes Gold, Silver, and White Pearl Sprinkles, Bright Confetti, and Blue, White, and Pretty Pink Mixes featuring nonpareils and shaped quins.
description: From the manufacturer Edible Cake Decorations With 11 unique sprinkle mixes Baked With Love Sprinkles are perfect for adding the finishing touch to homemade bakes and treats. The pre-mixed sugar sprinkle mixes are quick and easy to use and are available in a range of the most popular mixes right now! Each mix comes in an easy to use, resealable, bottle, ready to add a pop of colour and texture to cakes, cupcakes, ice cream, cookies, and all other desserts and sweet treats! The perfect dessert sprinkles for cakes, ice cream, cookies, and more. Rainbow Sprinkles Party Fun Sprinkles Confetti Bright Sprinkles Party Blue Sprinkles Aqua Pearls, Edible Balls Blossom Pearls, Edible Balls Opulent Pearls, Edible Balls Candy Pearls, Edible Balls Baked With Love Baking Cases Baked With Love Sugar Dinosaurs Baked With Love Cupcake Boxes Culpitt Individually Wrapped Cake Boards, 5 Pack Baked With Love Dinosaur Candles Culpitt Rainbow Sugar Decorations Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.6 out of 5 stars 709 4.1 out of 5 stars 205 4.5 out of 5 stars 309 4.6 out of 5 stars 1,777 4.7 out of 5 stars 43 4.0 out of 5 stars 18 Price £4.99 £ 4 . 99 £1.85 £ 1 . 85 £3.49 £ 3 . 49 £5.79 £ 5 . 79 £3.30 £ 3 . 30 £5.44 £ 5 . 44 Description These Greaseproof Baked With Love Brights Cupcake Cases will help set the scene for birthday, bakesales, celebrations or any other occasion that calls for cupcakes! These hand made royal icing Dinosaur decorations are ideal for all types of cupcakes and cakes. Carry and present your tasty treats in style with these Baked With Love Cupcake Boxes. Sure to enhance the look of your decorative mini-cakes, muffins, cupcakes or cookies. This white 12” box and silver square cake board set is the perfect way to efficiently and safely transport your special homemade cakes for birthdays, celebrations and parties. 5 Colourful Dinosaur Cake Candles, perfect for birthday cakes and more! 32 Pastel Rainbow Cake Decorations, ideal for Birthday's, Baby Shower's, Anniversaries, or any other celebration, these edible decorations are sure to transform or any homemade, or store bought, treat! Pack Size 150 Baking Cases 10 Roar-some Sugar Pipings Twin Pack 1 Board and Box 5 Candles 32 Printed Sugar Decorations
